Command.name: command-builder
Command.title: CommandBuilder
Command.Synopsis: command-builder goal="shape a command" format="xml" mode="draft"
Command.Description: Provides a stronger command authoring environment when raw XML or JSON becomes too cramped for careful editing.

Parameter.name: goal
Parameter.description: What the command needs to do.

Parameter.name: format
Parameter.description: Preferred output shape: xml, json, js, or mixed.

Command.Improve: Use this when command structure is the real problem. Prefer a few capable parameterized commands over many wrappers.
